sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Integra Resources Launches Record 50,000-Metre Drill Program Targeting Resource Growth, Mine Life Extension & Advanced Engineering
feed.summary: Integra Resources has initiated its largest-ever gold-focused exploration campaign, a 50,000-metre drill program across its Nevada and Idaho properties. The program, spanning the Florida Canyon Mine, Nevada North Project, and DeLamar Gold-Silver Project, aims to expand mineral resources, extend mine life, and gather critical engineering data for future development. This strategic reinvestment aligns with the company's multi-year plan to enhance value across its Great Basin gold-silver portfolio.

feed.title: ClearBridge Large Cap Growth Strategy Exited Salesforce (CRM) Due to Slowing Growth
feed.summary: ClearBridge Large Cap Growth Strategy exited its position in Salesforce (CRM) during the first quarter of 2026. This decision was driven by concerns over slowing growth in Salesforce's core business segments since 2022 and rising competitive pressures. The strategy repositioned its portfolio, increasing exposure to semiconductors and biopharmaceuticals, and favoring AI stocks with higher return potential.

feed.title: American Electric Power stock hits all-time high at 135.11 USD
feed.summary: American Electric Power (AEP) stock has reached an all-time high of $135.11, now trading at $136.05, representing a 36% increase over the past year, though InvestingPro analysis suggests it might be overvalued. The company plans a $4.2 billion Ohio transmission project for a data center campus and recently issued $750 million in senior notes, with leadership changes and a "Buy" upgrade from Ladenburg Thalmann contributing to investor confidence. AEP has also maintained dividend payments for 56 consecutive years, demonstrating strong financial stability.

feed.title: Alliant Energy stock hits all-time high at 73.46 USD
feed.summary: Alliant Energy (LNT) stock has reached an all-time high of $73.46, trading at $73.69 with a market cap of $18.9 billion. The company has a strong track record of dividend payments and investors are optimistic about its future prospects, supported by recent financial agreements and positive analyst ratings from RBC Capital and Wolfe Research. Despite its strong performance, InvestingPro data suggests the stock may be overvalued.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on Ingredion to $122 From $124, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: UBS has adjusted its price target for Ingredion (NYSE: INGR) to $122, down from $124, while maintaining a neutral rating on the stock. This update comes amidst other recent company news, including the appointment of an interim CFO and discussions around a new R&D collaboration. Ingredion, a global ingredient solutions provider, also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.82 per share.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on Delta Air Lines to $86 From $84, Maintains Buy Rating
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for Delta Air Lines (DAL) shares to $86 from $84, while reaffirming a "Buy" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects the firm's continued positive outlook on the airline, despite broader market movements. The report also highlights other analyst adjustments for Delta and general market news.

feed.title: Inmune Bio Inc stock: What investors need to know about its biotech potential now
feed.summary: Inmune Bio Inc is a biotech company focused on immune-modulating therapies for cancer and Alzheimer's, utilizing a platform that reprograms immune cells without genetic engineering. The company's pipeline includes candidates for solid tumors and Alzheimer's disease, leveraging natural killer cell activity and inflammation reduction. Investors are drawn to its potential for high returns in these high-need areas, with a strategy balancing clinical milestones across oncology and neurology.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on Corteva to $88 From $80, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for Corteva (CTVA) to $88 from $80, while maintaining a neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions for the agricultural chemical company, including Argus Research raising its target to $91 and Berenberg to $78, reflecting varying perspectives on Corteva's future performance. Corteva specializes in agricultural products, with its main activities in seed and grain production and crop protection products, and has a significant global presence.

feed.title: Occidental reports oil discovery at Bandit prospect in Gulf of America
feed.summary: The article reports that Occidental has discovered oil at its Bandit prospect in the Gulf of America. Further details regarding the discovery, such as production estimates or project timelines, are not provided in the current content.

feed.title: This Zscaler Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Thursday
feed.summary: Five companies, including Zscaler, Assertio Holdings, Bullish, GitLab Inc., and The AES Corporation, have received downgrades from top Wall Street analysts. Zscaler was downgraded from Buy to Neutral by BTIG, while Assertio Holdings saw its rating cut from Buy to Neutral and its price target lowered from $35 to $18. These downgrades reflect changing outlooks on the respective stocks by leading financial institutions.

feed.title: US Gulf operator hands out 20k subsea boosting deal
feed.summary: Beacon Offshore Energy has awarded a subsea boosting contract to SLB OneSubsea for its Shenandoah development in the US Gulf. The deal highlights ongoing investment in significant oil and gas projects within the region.

feed.title: Charles River Labs stock: New Asia partnership signals growth potential
feed.summary: Charles River Laboratories (CRL) recently signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with NSG Bio in Singapore, signaling a strategic expansion into the rapidly growing Asian biotech market. This partnership aims to accelerate biotech innovation by providing critical services like cell banking and characterization. The move positions CRL for potential revenue growth and strengthens its competitive edge in the global life sciences sector, making it an attractive consideration for investors seeking exposure to diversified biotech services.

feed.title: Lam Research Corp Stock (LRCX) Moved Up by 3.33% on Apr 9: A Full Analysis
feed.summary: Lam Research Corp (LRCX) stock advanced by 3.33% on April 9th, driven by strong semiconductor sector dynamics, favorable company results, and robust demand from AI applications. Despite a positive analyst outlook and multiple "Buy" ratings, the stock exhibited intraday volatility due to concerns regarding potential margin pressures, reliance on the Chinese market, and recent insider selling. Investors are keenly awaiting the upcoming fiscal third-quarter earnings report for further clarity on these factors.

feed.title: FirstEnergy Corporation stock hits 52-week high at $52.30 By Investing.com
feed.summary: FirstEnergy Corporation's stock reached a new 52-week high of $52.30, reflecting a 35.84% surge over the past year and a 12.28% gain in the last six months. While the stock is trading near its high and shows strong returns, InvestingPro analysis suggests it might be overvalued. The company recently restored power to most customers after storms, plans significant grid upgrades, and has seen its price target raised by BofA Securities due to strategic initiatives.

feed.title: Evergy Inc stock hits all-time high of 85.25 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Evergy Inc. stock has reached an all-time high of $85.25, trading just 1% below its 52-week high, and has shown a nearly 33% total return over the past year. Despite a recent earnings miss in Q4 2025, the utility company has consistently raised its dividend for 22 consecutive years, offering a 3.3% yield. Analysts have issued "Buy" ratings and raised price targets based on expanded capital plans and data center contracts, though InvestingPro data suggests the stock might be overvalued.

feed.title: Epam Systems stock hits 52-week low at $125.53 By Investing.com
feed.summary: EPAM Systems stock has fallen to a 52-week low of $125.38, representing a 36.6% year-to-date decline in 2026. Despite the current undervaluation and broader market challenges, analysts from Stifel, Mizuho, and TD Cowen maintain Buy ratings, citing the company's strong positioning in AI services and upwards earnings revisions. EPAM is strategically focusing on AI to drive future growth.

feed.title: Edison International stock hits 52-week high at 75.55 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Edison International stock reached a new 52-week high of $75.55, currently trading at $75.72, reflecting a 40.5% total return over the past year. Despite its strong performance and a low P/E ratio with a 4.72% dividend yield, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock is overvalued. Recent developments include compensation offers for wildfire victims, a downgrade to Neutral by UBS (while raising price target to $78.00), and a downgrade to Sell by Ladenburg Thalmann ($63.00 price target) due to potential rate case adjustments, alongside a $1.951 billion securitization for Woolsey fire claims.

feed.title: Nutanix and NetApp form strategic alliance with new integration for a modern cloud platform
feed.summary: Nutanix and NetApp have announced a strategic alliance to integrate NetApp's Intelligent Data Infrastructure with the Nutanix Cloud Platform (NCP) solution, including the Nutanix AHV hypervisor, later this year. This collaboration aims to provide customers with more flexibility in optimizing their virtualization and data strategies across various environments. Key benefits include easier modernization of on-premises and cloud environments, faster VM migration, simplified operations, VM-granular operations, and built-in cyber-resilience.

feed.title: Nextera Energy stock hits all-time high at 95.92 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Nextera Energy (NEE) has hit an all-time high of $95.92, reflecting robust performance with a 43.49% total return over the past year. Despite appearing overvalued by InvestingPro, the company boasts a 30-year consecutive dividend increase. Recent positive developments include increased price targets from UBS and Jefferies, a successful $600 million debenture sale, and approval for significant natural gas power plant projects in Texas and Pennsylvania.

feed.title: Air Products and Chemicals stock hits 52-week high at $301.14
feed.summary: Air Products and Chemicals (APD) stock reached a new 52-week high of $301.11, despite InvestingPro analysis suggesting it is overvalued. feed.title: MDA Space (NYSE:MDA) Now Covered by JPMorgan Chase & Co.
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. and Jefferies Financial Group have both initiated coverage on MDA Space (NYSE: MDA) with "Buy" or "Overweight" ratings. JPMorgan set a $34 price target, while Jefferies set a $41 price target, leading to a consensus "Buy" rating and an average price target of $37.50. MDA Space, a developer of space technologies, recently traded at $29.42 with low trading volume.

feed.title: WEC Energy Group stock hits all-time high at 118.6 USD
feed.summary: WEC Energy Group (WEC) stock has reached a new all-time high of $118.6 USD, surpassing its 52-week high, driven by consistent growth and strategic initiatives. Despite being considered overvalued by InvestingPro data, the company boasts 22 consecutive years of dividend increases with a 3.25% yield. Recent news includes its Q4 2025 financial results, several analyst price target increases, and a $400 million senior note issuance, all contributing to a positive outlook for the energy company.

feed.title: Range Resources (NYSE:RRC) Price Target Lowered to $46.00 at Truist Financial
feed.summary: Truist Financial has lowered its price target for Range Resources (NYSE:RRC) to $46.00 from $48.00, while maintaining a "hold" rating, suggesting a potential upside of 5.54%. Despite the lowered target, Range Resources recently surpassed its quarterly earnings and revenue estimates. The stock currently holds a consensus "Hold" rating among analysts, with an average target price of $43.06.

feed.title: Wells Fargo & Company Lowers Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) Price Target to $95.00
feed.summary: Wells Fargo & Company has lowered its price target for Synchrony Financial (NYSE:SYF) to $95.00 from $100.00, while maintaining an "overweight" rating. This new target implies a potential upside of 32.74% from the stock's previous close. Despite this reduction, Synchrony Financial recently beat its quarterly EPS estimates and provided strong FY2026 guidance, though some other analysts have also trimmed their price objectives.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Comments On Very Important Details About Conagra (CAG)
feed.summary: Jim Cramer discussed the challenges faced by food companies like Conagra Brands, Inc. (CAG), highlighting issues such as food inflation and the impact of weight loss drugs. While Conagra has seen organic growth and strong frozen food performance, its shares have declined significantly. Analysts from Evercore ISI and RBC Capital have lowered price targets for CAG, acknowledging the company's focus on cash flow and profits despite a tough operating environment.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Discusses Amazon (AMZN)’s Stock
feed.summary: Jim Cramer discussed Amazon (AMZN)'s stock, particularly its Kuiper satellite business and competition from SpaceX's Starlink. Wells Fargo recently adjusted its price target for Amazon to $305, maintaining an Overweight rating, citing stable capital expenditure guidance and potential growth in cloud business revenue leading to higher free cash flow, despite a recent dip in shares due to AI spending concerns. Amazon expects to invest $200 billion in capital expenditure for 2026.

feed.title: This Equinix Analyst Begins Coverage On A Bullish Note; Here Are Top 5 Initiations For Thursday
feed.summary: Five companies, including NovaGold Resources, REalloys Inc, Equinix Inc, Cognizant Technology Solutions, and Hovnanian Enterprises, received new analyst coverage. Analysts initiated coverage with ratings ranging from Overweight to Market Underperform, providing price targets for each stock.

feed.title: Galaxy Powers Staking Infrastructure for ETHB, BlackRock’s First Rewards-Generating Crypto ETP
feed.summary: Galaxy has been chosen as one of the approved validators for BlackRock's new iShares Staked Ethereum Trust ETF (ETHB), marking BlackRock's first rewards-generating crypto ETP. The ETHB product intends to stake a majority of its spot ether holdings through institutional validators like Galaxy, distributing rewards to investors monthly. This selection highlights Galaxy's robust systems and institutional-grade infrastructure for staking in the digital asset space.

feed.title: Harnessing the intent of AI
feed.summary: According to ADP Research’s Today at Work 2026 Issue 1, one in five workers use AI daily. This article discusses how organizations can effectively and responsibly integrate AI, with insights from Accenture’s David Shaw. Shaw highlights that AI offers opportunities for both businesses, by enabling faster, cheaper, and better operations, and individuals, by enhancing performance and creating new job opportunities.

feed.title: Coherent Has Surged 400% in a Year but Our $201.63 Target Says Sell Now
feed.summary: Coherent Corp (NYSE: COHR) has seen its stock surge by over 400% in the past year, driven by strong fundamentals like accelerating AI datacenter optical interconnect demand and consecutive earnings beats. However, 24/7 Wall St.'s model sets a price target of $201.63, significantly below its current trading price of $253.22, leading to a "SELL" recommendation due to the substantial gap between trailing and forward P/E ratios and potential risks associated with high valuation and debt. Despite a strong bull case fueled by AI datacenter growth and analyst consensus, the model suggests a significant downside, prompting caution for investors.

feed.title: Texas Instruments To Rally Around 20%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Thursday
feed.summary: This article compiles a list of analyst rating changes and price target adjustments for several major companies, including Texas Instruments, Alcoa, and Meta Platforms. Stifel upgraded Texas Instruments to Buy with a new price target of $250, suggesting a potential rally of around 20%. Other companies like Alcoa, Healthequity, and Marvell Technology also received upgraded ratings or increased price targets from various analysts.

feed.title: Revvity Launches Signals BioDesign Offering for Biologics Research Workflows
feed.summary: Revvity has introduced Signals BioDesign, a new solution aimed at enhancing biologics research workflows. The offering is designed to streamline the discovery and development process of biological therapies. This launch comes amidst recent analyst adjustments to Revvity's price targets, reflecting ongoing market interest in the company's innovations.

feed.title: TD Cowen Lowers BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) Price Target to $1,105.00
feed.summary: TD Cowen has reduced its price target for BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) to $1,105 from $1,238, while maintaining a "hold" rating, suggesting an 11.45% upside. Despite this adjustment and some negative sentiment regarding crypto outflows and insider selling, analyst sentiment generally remains a "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $1,263.33. BlackRock exceeded Q1 earnings estimates but faces risks from large crypto/ETF outflows and an investor litigation notice.

feed.title: Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) Stock Price Expected to Rise, JPMorgan Chase & Co. Analyst Says
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has increased its price target for Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) to $235 from $184, maintaining a "neutral" rating with a modest 1.4% upside from its previous close. This update comes amidst several other firms, including Goldman Sachs and UBS, also raising their price targets and issuing "Buy" or "Strong Buy" ratings, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus from MarketBeat analysts with an average price target of $227.00. Marathon Petroleum recently surpassed Q4 earnings estimates with an EPS of $4.07 and reported $32.57 billion in revenue, with the stock currently trading near $231.76.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Makes Brief But Important Remark For Tapestry (TPR)
feed.summary: Jim Cramer expressed a positive view on Tapestry (TPR), stating he "do[es] like Tapestry" and believes "they’re doing a very good job." This remark follows a strong performance by the luxury apparel maker, with shares up 131% over the past year and 8.6% year-to-date, coupled with an earnings beat and raised guidance in its fiscal second quarter. Multiple analysts have also reiterated Buy ratings and raised price targets for TPR.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Shares Why This Energy Stock Is A Standout
feed.summary: Jim Cramer highlighted Sempra (NYSE:SRE) as a standout energy stock, praising its presence in the American market and its strong operations. The utility company has seen significant share price increases over the past year and year-to-date, with analysts from Wells Fargo, Morgan Stanley, and JP Morgan issuing "Overweight" ratings and increasing price targets due to impressive earnings visibility, rate base growth, and infrastructure investments. Cramer specifically noted Sempra's sound management in areas like Texas, where public utility commissions do not excessively raise rates.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Comments On Key Debate Surrounding ServiceNow (NOW)
feed.summary: Jim Cramer discussed ServiceNow (NOW), noting its 34% stock drop but emphasizing that customers are still paying. This comes after Stifel reduced its price target due to a weak environment, while Benchmark initiated coverage with a Buy rating, citing potential benefits from agentic AI growth. The article also mentions Cramer's past praise for ServiceNow's CEO and success in delivering earnings surprises.

feed.title: Jim Cramer Shares Why ONEOK (OKE) Is His Favorite Gas Stock
feed.summary: Jim Cramer has named ONEOK (OKE) as one of his favorite gas stocks, citing its strong pipeline infrastructure and suitability for the current market environment. The midstream oil and gas company has seen its shares increase by 15% over the past year and 21% year-to-date. Analysts like Wells Fargo and Barclays have also raised price targets for ONEOK, anticipating benefits from increased demand for US energy and lower-tier gas basins.

feed.title: Susquehanna Cuts First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) Price Target to $250.00
feed.summary: Susquehanna has lowered its price target for First Solar (NASDAQ:FSLR) from $280 to $250, while maintaining a "positive" rating, indicating a potential 23.5% upside. This adjustment follows several other analysts trimming their targets, resulting in a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating with an average target of $246.13. Despite missing EPS estimates, First Solar exceeded revenue expectations, though insiders have been net sellers in recent months.

feed.title: Dover Corp. stock: $1.5B credit facility signals strong financial flexibility
feed.summary: Dover Corp. has secured a new $1.5 billion five-year unsecured revolving credit facility, replacing its previous agreement and extending its financial flexibility through 2031. This move signals strong lender confidence in the diversified industrial powerhouse, which operates across multiple sectors like engineered products, clean energy, and process solutions. The facility provides capital for general corporate needs, including potential acquisitions, and positions Dover for continued stability and growth in a challenging economic environment.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on Air Products and Chemicals to $307 From $285, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: UBS has increased its price target for Air Products and Chemicals Inc. to $307 from $285, while retaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated valuation by the investment bank. The article also mentions recent news and analyst activities related to Air Products, including other price target adjustments and news about its European operations being affected by energy costs.

feed.title: Intuit (INTU) Achieves FedNow Certification for Instant Payments
feed.summary: Intuit (INTU) has achieved FedNow Service certification, enabling faster instant payment solutions for businesses and improving cash flow management. The company shows robust financial health with strong revenue growth and profitability, and its valuation metrics suggest it is trading near historical lows. Despite insider selling activity and asset growth outpacing revenue, analysts maintain a positive "Buy" consensus on the stock.

feed.title: Infleqtion soars after announcing it’s providing upgraded quantum hardware to the International Space Station
feed.summary: Infleqtion's stock is experiencing a surge following its announcement to supply upgraded quantum hardware to the International Space Station for a mission launching as early as Friday. This new equipment aims to advance quantum sensing in space by producing dual-species quantum degenerate gases. The company also projects $40 million in sales for the current year, which would represent a significant increase in revenue growth.

feed.title: Sempra Energy stock reaches all-time high at 99.63 USD
feed.summary: Sempra Energy's stock has hit an all-time high of $100.25, marking a 49.7% 1-year total return, though InvestingPro suggests it might be overvalued. The company boasts 15 years of consistent dividend increases and has recently concluded significant bond offerings by both Sempra and its subsidiary, San Diego Gas & Electric. These financial moves and strong market performance underscore the company's growth and investor confidence in the energy sector.

feed.title: Masimo stock price target raised to $180 by Jefferies on Danaher deal
feed.summary: Jefferies has increased its price target for Masimo (NASDAQ:MASI) to $180 from $168, maintaining a Hold rating, in anticipation of Danaher's acquisition of the company. The deal, valued at $9.9 billion or $180 per share, is expected to finalize in the second half of 2026. Despite the stock appearing slightly overvalued currently, the acquisition offers Danaher a relative discount compared to Masimo's existing market valuation.

feed.title: Costco (COST) Price Target Raised by Wells Fargo to $1000 | COST Stock News
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Edward Kelly has raised the price target for Costco (COST) to $1000 from $950, while maintaining an Equal-Weight rating. This adjustment reflects a 5.26% increase in the analyst's target for the warehouse retail giant, indicating continued positive sentiment from analysts regarding the company's performance and outlook. Costco, founded in 1983, operates a global chain of membership-based warehouse clubs, with strong member renewal rates and diverse revenue streams, primarily from grocery and general merchandise offerings.

feed.title: Capital One Financial raised to Buy-equivalent at J.P. Morgan amid expected acquisition synergies (COF:NYSE)
feed.summary: J.P. Morgan has upgraded Capital One Financial (COF) to a Buy-equivalent rating from Neutral, designating it as their top pick in the consumer finance sector. This upgrade is driven by anticipated synergies from Capital One's recent acquisitions. The investment bank expects these strategic moves to benefit the credit card network stock.

feed.title: Huron Consulting Group's (HURN) Outperform Rating Reaffirmed at Wedbush
feed.summary: Wedbush has reaffirmed its "outperform" rating for Huron Consulting Group (NASDAQ:HURN) and set a $160.00 price target, suggesting a potential upside of 25.33%. Other analysts have given similar "buy" or "outperform" ratings, with an average consensus price target of $205.50. The company recently reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, and has provided positive FY 2026 guidance.

feed.title: Alpha Buying: Following Conviction, Not the Crowd
feed.summary: This article highlights Greenhaven Associates' value investing strategy, characterized by buying "ugly" but fundamentally sound assets well before the market recognizes their true worth. The firm's early 13F filing is seen as a deliberate signal of their conviction in contrarian positions. Examples include investments in ICON plc, DNOW Inc., Lennar Corporation, and Baxter International, all of which are depicted as cyclical or temporarily distressed businesses with strong underlying fundamentals.

feed.title: Gen Digital stock hits 52-week low at 18.2 USD
feed.summary: Gen Digital Inc.'s stock has fallen to a 52-week low of $18.20, trading at $18.14, and is considered undervalued according to InvestingPro analysis. The company has experienced significant declines, with its stock down 25.19% over the past year, 29% in six months, and 30% year-to-date, reflecting market pressures and company-specific challenges. Despite the downturn, Gen Digital recently reported strong Q3 FY 2026 earnings, exceeding analyst expectations, and had its outlook revised to stable by Fitch Ratings, while Wells Fargo initiated coverage with an "Equal Weight" rating.
